name: mcp-pexels
description: Search and fetch free stock photos, videos, and curated collections from Pexels.
long_description: A Model Context Protocol server that exposes the Pexels API as nine tools so any compatible AI client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue) can search photos, search videos, list curated collections, and retrieve individual items by id. Every response includes the current rate-limit headers so agents can self-throttle against the Pexels free-tier quota (200 req/hour, 20 000 req/month).

tools.name: pexels_search_photos
tools.description: Search Pexels photos by query with optional filters.

tools.name: pexels_curated_photos
tools.description: Fetch a real-time list of photos curated by the Pexels team.

tools.name: pexels_get_photo
tools.description: Retrieve a single Pexels photo by its id.

tools.name: pexels_search_videos
tools.description: Search Pexels videos by query with optional filters.

tools.name: pexels_popular_videos
tools.description: Fetch the current popular Pexels videos.

tools.name: pexels_get_video
tools.description: Retrieve a single Pexels video by its id.

tools.name: pexels_my_collections
tools.description: List the authenticated user's own Pexels collections.

tools.name: pexels_collection_media
tools.description: Retrieve photos and videos within a Pexels collection by id.

pexels_api_key.title: Pexels API Key
pexels_api_key.description: Get one for free at https://www.pexels.com/api/. The free tier allows 200 requests per hour and 20 000 requests per month.
